answer: **Summary:** I was unable to retrieve live results for FIFA World Cup 2026 Group D standings or USA/Turkey match results because all web-access tools (WebSearch, WebFetch, and ToolSearch) were unavailable during this session. I've provided the confirmed background facts from my training data — including that the tournament began June 11, 2026 with 48 teams in 12 groups, and that both the USA and Turkey are participants — but the specific match scores, Group D composition, and current standings require access to live sources like fifa.com, ESPN, or BBC Sport.
key_facts: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is hosted by USA, Canada, and Mexico, running June 11 – July 19, 2026.
The tournament expanded to 48 teams in 12 groups of 4 for the first time.
The group draw was held December 13, 2025 in Zurich, Switzerland.
The USA was placed in Pot 1 as co-hosts.
Turkey qualified for the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
Group stage matches began June 11, 2026; as of June 15, some matches may have been played.
